ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was last updated */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., Count, Memory, Attention) */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Detailed documentation for the experiment (e.g., participant instructions, experimental design) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters for the condition (e.g., stimulus duration, inter-stimulus interval) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the participant belongs to */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition the participant belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "participant_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the participant (e.g., handedness, educational background) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition the trial belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who completed the trial */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Number of the trial */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., practice, experimental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reported_data" (
  "reported_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reported value */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the reported value belongs to */,
  "reported_value" REAL /* Reported value for the trial */,
  "reported_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the reported value (e.g., seconds, milliseconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reported_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reported_data_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "durations" (
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each duration value */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the duration value belongs to */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the trial */,
  "duration_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the duration value (e.g., seconds, milliseconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_durations_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confidence" (
  "confidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confidence rating */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the confidence rating belongs to */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level for the trial */,
  "confidence_scale" TEXT /* Scale used for confidence rating (e.g., 1-5, 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("confidence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_confidence_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confidence_rt" (
  "confidence_rt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confidence reaction time */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the confidence reaction time belongs to */,
  "confidence_rt" REAL /* Confidence reaction time for the trial */,
  "confidence_rt_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the confidence reaction time (e.g., seconds, milliseconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("confidence_rt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_confidence_rt_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the stimulus belongs to */,
  "stimulus_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters for the stimulus (e.g., size, color, orientation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimuli_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimenters" (
  "experimenter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimenter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the experimenter belongs to */,
  "experimenter_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimenter */,
  "experimenter_email" TEXT /* Email of the experimenter */,
  "experimenter_role" TEXT /* Role of the experimenter (e.g., principal investigator, research assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experimenter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimenters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, experimenter, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the experiment (e.g., data analysis, quality control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the analysis belongs to */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., statistical, machine learning) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the publication belongs to */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  "publication_doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the conference belongs to */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "conference_date" TEXT /* Date when the conference was held */,
  "conference_location" TEXT /* Location of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conferences_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
